title: Query ran over JDBC fails, but when run on conductor runs well
description:
Hello everyone,
I am trying to run the following query:
WITH GRAPH <http://127.0.0.1:3002/dendro_graph>
DELETE
{
   </r/folder/3d48499d-d7c4-4d32-9645-18fc91226b46> nie:hasLogicalPart </r/file/4bc0ef0a-cd47-4562-8d07-71d184d1f20f>.
   </r/file/4bc0ef0a-cd47-4562-8d07-71d184d1f20f> nie:isLogicalPartOf </r/folder/3d48499d-d7c4-4d32-9645-18fc91226b46>
}
INSERT
{
   </r/folder/fd97d6d5-3733-4bae-bc01-c653212a341c> nie:hasLogicalPart </r/file/4bc0ef0a-cd47-4562-8d07-71d184d1f20f>.
   </r/file/4bc0ef0a-cd47-4562-8d07-71d184d1f20f> nie:isLogicalPartOf </r/folder/fd97d6d5-3733-4bae-bc01-c653212a341c>
};

In the Conductor, it executes correctly:

Via JDBC (through node-jdbc wrapper) it gives me this error:
Error: Error running instance method
virtuoso.jdbc4.VirtuosoException: SQ074: Line 13:
	at virtuoso.jdbc4.VirtuosoResultSet.process_result(VirtuosoResultSet.java:597)
	at virtuoso.jdbc4.VirtuosoResultSet.<init>(VirtuosoResultSet.java:174)
	at virtuoso.jdbc4.VirtuosoStatement.sendQuery(VirtuosoStatement.java:234)
	at virtuoso.jdbc4.VirtuosoStatement.executeUpdate(VirtuosoStatement.java:398)
	at sun.reflect.NativeMethodAccessorImpl.invoke0(Native Method)
	at sun.reflect.NativeMethodAccessorImpl.invoke(NativeMethodAccessorImpl.java:62)
	at sun.reflect.DelegatingMethodAccessorImpl.invoke(DelegatingMethodAccessorImpl.java:43)
	at java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:498)

output of virtuoso-t:
Version 7.2.5-dev.3217-pthreads

Using JDBC driver virtjdbc4_2.jar from the folder of Virtuoso's installation
Any ideas on what it could be?
Thanks,
João
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS dendro_graph (subject TEXT, predicate TEXT, object TEXT);
INSERT INTO dendro_graph (subject, predicate, object) VALUES ('/r/folder/3d48499d-d7c4-4d32-9645-18fc91226b46', 'nie:hasLogicalPart', '/r/file/4bc0ef0a-cd47-4562-8d07-71d184d1f20f');
DELETE FROM dendro_graph WHERE subject = '/r/folder/3d48499d-d7c4-4d32-9645-18fc91226b46' AND predicate = 'nie:hasLogicalPart' AND object = '/r/file/4bc0ef0a-cd47-4562-8d07-71d184d1f20f';
INSERT INTO dendro_graph (subject, predicate, object) VALUES ('/r/folder/fd97d6d5-3733-4bae-bc01-c653212a341c', 'nie:hasLogicalPart', '/r/file/4bc0ef0a-cd47-4562-8d07-71d184d1f20f');
SELECT subject FROM dendro_graph WHERE predicate = 'nie:hasLogicalPart';
key_bug_features: Query execution failure over JDBC for specific SPARQL commands
